text.title: Immersive Design Principles Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: select-audience-and-hardware
step.action: Pick audience + target hardware; lock session-length cap.

step.name: design-spatial-audio
step.action: Enable spatial audio; design subtitle + visual fallback.

step.name: list-a11y-paths
step.action: Document seated + single-handed + mono-vision + low-vision paths.

step.name: set-fov-budget
step.decision-gate: If primary UI breaches budget, redesign.
